# Emoji Line Wrapping Test

This line has text that goes on and on and on and continues until we reach the right margin and then adds emoji 🎉 to see if it wraps correctly.

This is another line with many emoji at the end to test wrapping behavior 😀 😃 😄 😁 😆 😅 🤣 😂 😊 😇 and more text after.

Multiple emoji in sequence without much text between them: 🚀 💯 🔥 ✨ 🎯 🎨 🎭 🎪 🎮 🎧 should wrap properly.

A very long line with text text text text text text text text text text text text text text text and emoji 👍 in the middle text text text text text text text text text text text and more emoji 💪 near the end.
